capabilities.description: Place a broker, exchange, or simulated order.
capabilities.reason: The contract is read-only and has no execution path.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Cancel an order.
capabilities.reason: Order mutation is outside the contract.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Modify price, quantity, session, or order state.
capabilities.reason: Order mutation is prohibited.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Execute a trade or trigger execution.
capabilities.reason: Trading automation and execution are prohibited.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Start any trading bot.
capabilities.reason: Bot control is prohibited.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Stop or modify any trading bot.
capabilities.reason: Bot control is prohibited.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Reopen a grid strategy.
capabilities.reason: The ZEC grid remains closed and this contract cannot control it.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Connect to a broker API.
capabilities.reason: No broker connector exists or is authorized.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Connect to Binance APIs.
capabilities.reason: No Binance connector exists or is authorized.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Connect to an external market-data API.
capabilities.reason: External data connections are prohibited.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Fetch or stream live market data.
capabilities.reason: Static evidence must not be represented as live.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Create, update, or delete runtime state through the API contract.
capabilities.reason: The contract is read-only.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Promote governance evidence to the active checkpoint.
capabilities.reason: Checkpoint promotion requires separate runtime governance.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Suppress a warning or stale-state banner.
capabilities.reason: Warnings must remain visible.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Hide data-quality limitations.
capabilities.reason: Data-quality flags are mandatory consumer context.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Reveal a never-expose field.
capabilities.reason: Never-expose fields are rejected before rendering.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Collect a password, token, key, or login value.
capabilities.reason: Credential handling is prohibited.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Store a password, token, key, or login value.
capabilities.reason: Credential storage is prohibited.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Export sensitive account values to a customer-facing view.
capabilities.reason: Customer-facing readiness and masking approval are absent.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.

capabilities.description: Enable a customer-facing cockpit interface.
capabilities.reason: Customer-facing rendering remains blocked.
capabilities.validator_expectation: Must remain blocked for all roles.
